section_name: Officer Angel David Garcia Memorial Interchange
text:
(a) The interchange in El Paso between Interstate Highway 10 and Joe Battle Boulevard is designated as the Officer Angel David Garcia Memorial Interchange.

(b) The department shall design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Officer Angel David Garcia Memorial Interchange and any other appropriate information.

(c) The department shall erect a marker at one or more sites on the interchange and approaching the interchange in each direction.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.091 (Sam Johnson Highway) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(49), eff. September 1, 2015.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.094 — Officer Angel David Garcia Memorial Interchange

(a) The interchange in El Paso between Interstate Highway 10 and Joe Battle Boulevard is designated as the Officer Angel David Garcia Memorial Interchange.

(b) The department shall design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Officer Angel David Garcia Memorial Interchange and any other appropriate information.

(c) The department shall erect a marker at one or more sites on the interchange and approaching the interchange in each direction.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.091 (Sam Johnson Highway) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(49), eff. September 1, 2015.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 725 (H.B.3946), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*
